scripts.start:fix: node -e "const net=require('net');const port=process.env.PORT||5000;const server=net.createServer();server.once('error',err=>{if(err.code==='EADDRINUSE'){console.log('Port 5000 already in use; continuing with fallback port 5001');process.env.PORT='5001';require('./server.js');}else{throw err;}});server.once('listening',()=>server.close(()=>{require('./server.js');}));server.listen(port);"
